Account

Username -
Email -
Roles -
Database -

Names

Addresses

E-Mail

Phone

Authentication

Last Login -
Session ID -
Password Changed -

Tokens

Contact administrator for new tokens

Language

Interface language for menus and labels

Sample Date & Time

Edit to preview your formats with a different date/time
Preview: January 1, 2020 at 2:03:02 PM

Built-in Date Formats

These formats are always available. Edit the format string to customize.

Short Date
2020-01-01
Long Date
January 1, 2020

Custom Date Formats

Create your own named date formats.

Built-in Time Formats

These formats are always available. Edit the format string to customize.

Short Time
2:03 PM
Medium Time
2:03:02 PM
Long Time
2:03:02 PM UTC

Custom Time Formats

Create your own named time formats.

Built-in DateTime Formats

These formats are always available. Edit the format string to customize.

Short DateTime
2020-01-01 2:03 PM
Long DateTime
January 1, 2020 at 2:03:02 PM

Custom DateTime Formats

Create your own named datetime formats.

Luxon Format Tokens

These tokens can be used in format strings. The preview uses the sample date above.

Years
TokenOutputDescription
y2020Year
yy202-digit year
yyyy20204-digit year
yyyyy020205-digit year
Months
TokenOutputDescription
M1Month number
MM01Padded month
MMMJanAbbreviated
MMMMJanuaryFull month
Days
TokenOutputDescription
d1Day of month
dd01Padded day
EEEWedAbbreviated weekday
EEEEWednesdayFull weekday
Hours
TokenOutputDescription
H1424-hour (0-23)
HH14Padded 24-hour
h212-hour (1-12)
hh02Padded 12-hour
aPMAM/PM
apmam/pm
Minutes
TokenOutputDescription
m3Minutes
mm03Padded minutes
Seconds
TokenOutputDescription
s2Seconds
ss02Padded seconds
Timezone
TokenOutputDescription
Z+0000Numeric offset
ZZ+00:00Numeric with colon
zUTCTimezone name
Literals
TokenOutputDescription
'text'textliteral text
[text]textliteral (escaped)

Number Formats

Decimal and thousands separator style

Preview

Number: -
Currency: -

Startup

Default database for new connections

Notifications

Concierge

Annotations

Tours

Training

Complete interactive tutorials to learn the application

Login History

Last Login -
Previous Login -
IP Address -
Device -

Lookups Manager

Default display mode for lookup tables
Number of rows to display per page
Automatically refresh lookup data when changes are detected
How often to check for updates (10-3600 seconds)
Display inactive/disabled lookup entries by default
Cache lookup data in localStorage for offline access
